name: Coconut Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and cocoa in a large bowl.
2. Add milk and water, stirring until well combined.
3. Bring mixture to a boil over medium-high heat.
4. Boil to soft ball stage (234-238°F).
5. Remove from heat and allow to cool to room temperature.
6. Stir in coconut and chopped nuts.
7. Stir in butter and vanilla extract.
8. Beat the mixture until it begins to thicken slightly.
9. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper, forming small patties.
10. Allow to cool completely before serving.
